usp.intro: Omdat We Reizen is for travelers who want to experience culture rather than observe it, who consciously choose the train, and who prefer arriving somewhere over landing somewhere

routes.title: You ride along, we know the way
routes.description: Our routes are routes we've traveled ourselves. No brochures, no assumptions — real knowledge of every platform, every city, and every restaurant worth visiting.

train.title: The journey begins on the platform
train.description: No airport, no queues, no wasted hours. With us, the train journey itself is part of the experience — you arrive rested, curious, and already a little immersed in the story.
train.highlight: On average 75% less CO₂ than flying

unique.title: Destinations you won't find on Google
unique.description: We don't choose destinations because they're popular. We choose them because they have something to tell — and because we can tell that story.

member.name: Jelmer de Jong
member.bio: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

about.pullquote: Journeys that move you. Stories that stay with you.
mission_statement: My goal is to give you a trip you'll look back on with joy and fulfillment — long after you're back home.

I believe travel is more than a destination. It's about the people you meet, the cultures that move you, and the stories you take with you. That's why I bring travelers, cultures, and stories together in a sustainable way — with respect for the world around us and the people who are part of it.

Sustainable travel isn't reserved for train enthusiasts or committed sustainability advocates — it's for anyone who wants to enjoy a trip that contributes to something meaningful. I believe the train is the future. Not as a compromise, but as the most beautiful way to travel.

I want you to feel inspired — by the stories behind a place, the cultures that welcome you, and the landscapes that glide past your window. But inspiration only begins when your mind is free. That's why I take care of all the planning and organization, so you have the space to enjoy the journey and everything you encounter along the way.
I'm only satisfied when you come home richer than when you left — richer in experiences, insights, and memories.
about.why_title: Why I started Omdat We Reizen
about.why_statement: To me, traveling is different from a vacation. It is the same difference between literature and reading material. It is breaking out of your bubble, discovering places that broaden your horizons. It is the broadening that makes you a little more human, for a moment—or forever. I want to pass on that feeling. With train routes that touch you and stories that stay with you.

contact.hero_tagline: Curious about a route? Or just a question? I'd love to hear from you.

contact_cta.heading: Have a question?
contact_cta.body: I'd love to tell you more about the routes, the planning, or simply what awaits you.
